name: provider-manager-shared-pool-foundation
title: Implement Provider Manager shared pool foundation
description: Implement the next architecture slice after the system test plan update: Provider Manager control-plane foundation, shared provider/model registry evidence, frontend entry, executable contracts, and real system-test coverage.
creator: bamboo-pan
notes: Implementation complete locally, not committed. Added Provider Manager control-plane API/UI/persistence with built-in Google AI Studio invariants, custom OpenAI-compatible provider CRUD, credential refs/masked summaries, model catalog metadata, health state, and audit-safe events. Added startup browser warmup retry/backoff plus bounded startup capture so outer startup retry owns retries; added AISTUDIO_WARMUP_TEXT_MODEL defaulting to gemini-3-flash-preview because real WSL evidence showed gemma-4-31b-it can produce AI Studio GenerateContent permission denied during template capture for the active account. Follow-up warmup evidence: original active account acc_180b3249 still fails the full WSL /health warmup gate with Page.goto Timeout 30000ms; alternate account acc_1840d770 also failed one full WSL /health gate at /home/bamboo/nexus-studio-warmup-gate-acc_1840d770-20260602-074129 with Page.goto Timeout 30000ms. Direct AIStudioClient.warmup for acc_1840d770 failed with the previous 10000ms startup template_capture_timeout_ms, then passed with startup template_capture_timeout_ms=30000 and captured models/gemini-3-flash-preview (ALT_CLIENT_WARMUP_30_OK). Startup-only template capture timeout is now 30000ms while startup internal template retries remain disabled and runtime capture retry behavior remains unchanged. Post-update alternate-account WSL /health gate passed from a copied workspace/account registry at /home/bamboo/nexus-studio-warmup-gate-acc_1840d770-20260602-075522 with status=complete. Verification: git diff --check passed; VS Code diagnostics found no src/tests errors; focused warmup/provider/config/static/system-plan tests passed (115 passed); final focused warmup tests passed (85 passed); final full Windows unit suite passed (389 passed in 5.53s). Real WSL Provider Manager API+Chromium UI smoke passed at /home/bamboo/nexus-studio-system-test-20260602-021136 on port 18080 using accounts_dir=/home/bamboo/nexus-studio/data/accounts; provider API evidence: audit_count=3, model_count=1; ui-console-errors.txt empty. Full global /health warmup gate is still blocked and must not be claimed as a pass for acc_180b3249: latest active-account gate /home/bamboo/nexus-studio-warmup-gate-20260602-022231 failed with warmup.status=failed for acc_180b3249 and Page.goto Timeout 30000ms exceeded; a startup-phase blocking warmup experiment did not resolve the failure and was reverted. Direct AIStudioClient warmup and direct FastAPI lifespan warmup both completed against the same auth/code, while fresh uvicorn server gate/no-poll runs still hit Page.goto Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Provider Manager Phase 1 passes; complete SYSTEM_TEST_PLAN global Google warmup remains account/runtime dependent unless using the verified alternate account.
